description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and twisted limbs and body parts. The head is human-like, featuring facial details and hair, but is disconnected from a natural body form. The arms and legs are stretched and angular, with some areas showing hints of clothing and shoes, though the proportions are extremely exaggerated. The surface is smooth and features a mix of skin tones and stylized clothing textures, with some areas resembling fabric and others more abstract. The object lacks anatomical coherence, with limbs and torso blending into each other in a surreal, almost sculptural manner. The overall form is not functional as a typical human figure but retains enough cues to be recognized as a pedestrian adult.
description: A surreal, distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs, a detailed head, and abstracted body and clothing features.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are most visible, with a long, stretched arm and angular leg forms extending outward.
description_view_1: Profile view highlights the elongated neck, arm, and a shoe-like foot, with the head facing left and limbs appearing more angular.
description_view_2: Rear view shows the back of the head and the abstracted, twisted lower limbs, with less detail on the face.
description_view_3: Lower body and foot are prominent, with the abstracted limbs and angular forms dominating the view.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted top and pants with ballet-style shoes
attribute_posture: contorted, with limbs extended and twisted in an unnatural pose
